title: ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’ | TechCrunch
summary: Christopher Nolan, the Oscar-winning director whose new version of “The Odyssey” is currently conquering the box office , said it’s been “pretty encouraging” to see deep skepticism of AI, especially from young people .
